sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_least (a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_least (a, b, c) VALUES (10, 20, 30), (5, 15, 25), (1, 2, 3);
SELECT least(a, b, c) AS smallest_value FROM test_least;
UPDATE test_least SET b = least(a, c) WHERE a < 5;
SELECT a, b, least(b, 100) AS capped_b FROM test_least WHERE a > 0;
